use_cases: Landing pages for creative agencies requiring immersive visual experiences
Product launch pages for tech companies seeking distinctive hero sections
Portfolio websites for photographers and digital artists
SaaS landing pages wanting premium animated hero sections
E-commerce brand homepages with artistic visual impact
ai_summary: A premium hero section featuring a Three.js-powered woven light canvas background with animated text reveal effects. The dark-themed component combines 3D graphics with gradient lighting to create an immersive visual experience suitable for creative portfolios, SaaS landing pages, and media brands seeking distinctive hero presentations.
